sources.title: AI in Drug Discovery Market to Hit USD 10.29 Bn by 2031 at 27%+ CAGR — Mordor Intelligence
sources.key_data: Market to reach USD 10.29B by 2031 at 25.94% CAGR; quantum ML advancing rapidly

sources.title: Artificial Intelligence In Drug Discovery Market Report, 2033
sources.key_data: Market at USD 2.35B in 2025; 24.83% CAGR from 2026 to 2033

sources.title: AI in Drug Discovery Market Rises USD 160.49 Billion by 2035
Google DeepMind and Isomorphic Labs introduce AlphaFold 3 AI model
sources.key_data: AF3 can predict interactions across proteins, DNA, RNA, small molecules, ions

sources.title: AlphaFold 3: transformative advances in drug design and therapeutics — PMC
sources.key_data: AF3 predicts 76% of protein-ligand interactions correctly vs. 52% for previous best tool

sources.title: Isomorphic Labs announces $600M external investment round
sources.key_data: $600M Series A led by Thrive Capital + GV; first external funding since DeepMind spinout (2021)

sources.title: Isomorphic Labs raises $600M toward AI drug design — BioPharma Dive
sources.key_data: Funding to power AI drug design engine and advance therapeutic programs to clinic

sources.title: A generative AI-discovered TNIK inhibitor for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis: a randomized phase 2a trial
sources.key_data: First AI-designed drug Phase IIa: +98.4 mL FVC in 60mg QD group vs. −62.3 mL placebo (71 patients, 12 weeks)

sources.title: Insilico Medicine announces Nature Medicine publication of Phase IIa results of Rentosertib
sources.key_data: Rentosertib (ISM001-055) — both target and molecule discovered entirely by generative AI; IPF indication

sources.title: FDA Draft Guidance: Considerations for the Use of AI to Support Regulatory Decision-Making
sources.key_data: First FDA guidance on AI in drug development; 7-step risk-based credibility assessment framework; comment period closed April 7, 2025

sources.title: Recursion and Exscientia combine to create global AI drug discovery leader
sources.key_data: Merger of Recursion + Exscientia — combined 60+ PB proprietary data, 2.2M experiments/week, $20B+ in future milestones

sources.title: AI-Discovered Drugs Reach Phase III — 2026 Will Determine Whether All the Promises Were Real
sources.key_data: 173 AI-discovered programs in clinical trials (94 Phase I, 56 Phase II, 15 Phase III); 15-20 pivotal trials expected in 2026

sources.title: AI Biotech Funding: A 2025 Analysis of VC Investment Trends
sources.key_data: $3.3B invested in AI drug discovery in 2024 (+27% YoY); 530+ companies globally; total sector raised $420B+ in disclosed funding

sources.title: Who Owns the AI-Discovered Drug? Patent Ownership Guide for Pharma IP Teams
sources.key_data: USPTO: AI cannot be named as inventor; human must 'significantly contribute' to every claim; black-box AI makes attribution legally ambiguous

sources.title: AI Drug Discovery and Patent Law — Goodwin Law
sources.key_data: Analysis of AI inventorship doctrines; co-ownership risks in pharma AI partnerships; data licensing gaps

sources.title: 2026: The Year AI Reinvents Drug Discovery
sources.key_data: Summary of 2025 milestones; 2026 as inflection year for AI clinical proof

sources.title: AI accelerates drug discovery from decades to months — Isomorphic Labs Drug Design Engine
sources.key_data: Isomorphic's Drug Design Engine advances beyond AlphaFold — multimodal optimization across targets, off-targets, ADMET

sources.title: Leading AI-driven drug discovery platforms: 2025 landscape and global outlook
sources.key_data: Comprehensive 2025 landscape of 530+ AI drug discovery companies; platform comparison across discovery modalities
